name: Dining Hall
description:
Entering this chamber a long solid wood table greets your gaze...The table
has twenty large, oversized, velvet covered chairs, which line both sides
of the table...Candelabras line the table and the walls of the dinning hall,
giving off a gentle and soothing glow...Although this room is enormous, it
is also easily converted into a quiet spot for a romantic candle lit
dinner with that special someone...
